summary: Classified the five open PRs independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are planned; the shard is not a dedupe cluster and the safe outcome is conservative backlog classification plus scoped human review where maintainer judgment is explicitly required.

actions.reason: Standalone Feishu behavior PR with missing proof; not closable or mergeable in this inventory shard.
Standalone provider/config feature PR with missing proof and compatibility/auth-provider review risk; keep open outside this shard.
Plausible focused bug-fix PR, but this job cannot merge and one quality gate is failing; no closure basis.
Maintainer-owned/maintainer-labeled stacked doctor work with dirty merge state and unhydrated stack dependencies needs maintainer sequencing judgment, not autonomous closeout.
Active contributor follow-up asks for a maintainer proof override and the PR still has failing proof/lint gates; human judgment is required for whether and how to proceed.

needs_human: #84326: maintainer-labeled stacked doctor PR has dirty merge state and unhydrated stack dependencies (#86627/#84290), requiring maintainer sequencing/technical judgment.
